Off Calendar Feb-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MARILYN YU Motion for Leave to File First Amended Complaint. (All calendar matters this date originating out of Department 302, were called from Department 301 by Judge Busch, due to unavailability of Judge Woolard.) Appearances: Heather E. Borlase, Esq. of Bayer & Borlase, (415) 558-9960 appearing for Plaintiff and moving party. There are no other appearances. (This matter is not being contested.) The Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows: Motion is granted. Order signed in open Court. (302/CWW) Judge: Peter J. Busch; Court Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189

DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-05-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MARILYN YU'S DEMURRER TO DEFENDANT COMMUNITY EDUCATIONAL SERVICES OF SAN FRANCISCO'S ANSWER.
APPEARANCES: Alan B. Bayer, Esq. of Bayer & Borlase 558-9960 for pltf & moving party; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend as to the fifth affirmative defense for unclean hands. Defendant must plead facts demonstrating new matter to support unclean hands. Demurrer overruled as to remaining allegations. Order on demurrer signed in open court. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: MARIA VISCIO, CSR #12353

APPEARANCES: Alan B. Bayer, Esq. of Bayer & Borlase 558-9960 for pltf & moving party; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Motion to strike denied. Order on motion to strike signed in open court. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: MARIA VISCIO, CSR #12353
